## Summary

Converts the "Revise" header nav item from a single link into a dropdown menu with two options:
- **Revise Queue** → `/revise`
- **Revise Workbench** → `/workbench-v2`

Follows the same dropdown pattern used by Agent Readiness, Storygate Studio, and Resources menus. Mobile nav also updated with both links.

## Scope

**Touches:** `components/HeaderNav.jsx` only — desktop dropdown + mobile links + click-outside/escape handlers.

**Does NOT touch:** Any page components, routing, or evaluation pipeline.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — purely additive UI change to navigation. All existing nav behavior preserved.

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — frontend nav only, no pipeline code touched.
